title: Safe autocycle command for audit + run-next-ticket loop
problem: Operators lack a bounded machine-readable command that combines principal gate inspection, audit/run-next-ticket planning, and safe verification without blind autonomous multi-ticket merges.
acceptance_criteria: operator_autocycle --mode plan emits structured JSON with gate, stop_reason, and next_command.
execute-safe mode runs allowlisted verification only and stops before ticket implementation.
Hard stop on dirty tree, overdue cadence without audit, missing pre-ticket audit, medium/high risk without flags, drift warnings, and docs-only streaks.
Unit tests cover plan read-only, caps, and stop conditions.
No git push, merge, or autonomous ticket implementation.
non_goals: git push or merge conflict resolution.
rollback_plan: Remove operator_autocycle module and tests; retain operator_loop.
